results.text: Tomas Chrenko - Stats, Contract, Salary & More - Elite Prospects. Chrenko is a quick skater and puck handler. He loves to challenge opponents one-on-one, deking through triangles, faking inside before going around the outside, or using his strong edges to turn for space. Tomas Chrenko – 2026 NHL Draft Prospect Profile - The Hockey Writers. A fringe first-round prospect, Tomas Chrenko is a smallish forward with a lot of offensive upside drawing attention in the 2026 NHL Draft.
